latin: Homo desperatus in summo scalarum gradu constitit, telum ingens manibus tenens. ad hostes suos clamavit: 'salutate amiculum meum!'

questions.target: At the top of a staircase
choices: At the top of a staircase

questions.prompt: What does he call his weapon?

translation: A desperate man stood at the top of the stairs, holding an enormous weapon in his hands. He shouted to his enemies: 'Say hello to my little friend!'
